meta.title: Leggera Labs — Private Local AI & Automation for SMEs
meta.description: We deploy private, on-premise LLMs and engineer process automation for small and medium businesses. Your data never leaves your walls.

hero.badge: Private AI · On-Premise · Zero Cloud Lock-in
hero.subtitle: We build private, locally-hosted AI and automation systems for ambitious SMEs — the intelligence of a frontier model, without ever sending a single byte to the cloud.

problem.label: The Vision
problem.title: The cloud was never built for your secrets.
problem.subtitle: Every prompt sent to a public API is a copy of your business leaving the building. We bring the model to your data — not the other way around.

cloud.title: Public Cloud AI
points: Vendor lock-in and silent model changes

local.title: Local LLMs by Leggera Labs
points: Data stays fully inside your walls
You own the weights and the workflow

services.label: Expertise
services.title: Two disciplines. One outcome: leverage.
services.subtitle: We pair private model deployment with deep automation engineering to turn your operations into a quiet, compounding advantage.

items.title: Local LLM Deployments
items.description: Production-grade private language models running on your hardware or private cloud. Tuned for privacy, cost-efficiency and the exact tasks your team performs every day.

items.title: Advanced Process Automation
items.description: End-to-end orchestration of the work nobody should do by hand. We connect your tools, data and AI into reliable, observable pipelines that simply run.

useCases.label: Use cases
useCases.title: Where private AI quietly pays off.
useCases.subtitle: Concrete starting points we can build on your infrastructure — each one keeps your data in-house.

items.title: Chat with your documents
items.description: A private assistant that answers questions from your contracts, offers and internal knowledge base — with sources, never leaving your server.
items.impact: From hours of searching to instant answers

items.title: Invoice & document processing
items.description: Automatically read, classify and route incoming documents into your systems, with a human checkpoint where it matters.

items.title: Customer enquiry triage
items.description: Draft replies, categorise and prioritise inbound messages so your team starts every morning ahead instead of behind.

items.title: Your private internal copilot
items.description: A company-wide assistant that knows how you actually work — onboarding, procedures, FAQs — running entirely on-premise.

approach.label: How we work
approach.title: A clear path from idea to running system.
approach.subtitle: No black boxes. You see working software early and own everything at the end.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: We map the process, the data and the goal — and agree on what success looks like before any code is written.

steps.title: Proof of concept
steps.description: We build a working prototype on your real data, on your infrastructure, so you judge results — not slides.

steps.title: Deployment
steps.description: We harden, integrate and roll out the solution into your daily tools, with your team trained to use it.

steps.title: Ownership & support
steps.description: You own the weights and the workflow. We stay on for monitoring, iteration and a clean handover.

showcase.label: From our lab
showcase.title: Built in the open. Real screens, real systems.
showcase.subtitle: While we onboard our first partners, here's what we're building in our own lab — the same engineering we bring to your processes.

founding.label: Founding partners
founding.title: We're selecting our first partners.
founding.description: As a new, founder-led studio we're taking on a small number of flagship projects at preferential terms — in exchange for honest feedback and, if you're happy, a reference case study. You get senior attention and lower risk; together we build the proof.
points: Direct access to the founder, not account managers
A proof of concept before you commit
Co-create a case study you'll be proud of

founder.label: Who you'll work with
founder.title: Designed by the person who'll build your system.
founder.body: Leggera Labs is founder-led by design. You talk directly to the person who designs, builds and ships your solution — no layers, no handoffs, no account managers reading from a script. Sharper decisions, faster iterations, and someone who genuinely cares that the result works.
founder.quote: Businesses shouldn't have to trade their privacy for intelligence. That's the whole reason Leggera Labs exists.
founder.name: Patryk Piecyk

items.q: Can a local model really match the big cloud ones?
items.a: For most business tasks — document Q&A, drafting, classification, extraction — modern open models like Qwen, Llama and DeepSeek are more than capable. We pick and tune the right model for your specific job, not a one-size-fits-all chatbot.
Yes — that's the whole point. The model runs on your hardware or private cloud, so prompts and documents never leave your control. Nothing is sent to a third-party API.
Less than most people expect. Many use cases run on a single workstation-class GPU or a modest private server. We size the setup to your workload during discovery.

items.q: How long does a project take?
items.a: A focused proof of concept usually takes a couple of weeks. Full deployment depends on scope, but you'll see working results early rather than waiting months.

items.q: You're new — why should I trust you?
items.a: Fair question. We're a founder-led studio, so you work directly with the person building your system. We prove value with a working proof of concept before you commit, and our founding-partner terms are designed to lower your risk while we grow our track record together.

items.q: What if my team isn't technical?
items.a: That's normal — and our job. We handle the engineering, integrate into the tools you already use, and train your team so the solution feels effortless.

cta.title: Let's make your data work for you.
cta.subtitle: Tell us where the friction is. We'll show you what private AI can quietly remove.
cta.bookingText: Prefer to start with zero commitment?
cta.bookingCta: Book a free readiness audit (20 min)

footer.tagline: Private AI & automation for the businesses that can't afford to leak.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Leggera Labs ("we", "us") processes personal data in accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR). This document is a placeholder template and should be reviewed by qualified legal counsel before publication.

sections.heading: 1. Data Controller
sections.body: Leggera Labs is the controller of personal data collected through this website. For any privacy-related request, contact us at the address listed in the footer.

sections.heading: 2. What data we collect
sections.body: We process contact details you voluntarily provide (such as your name, email and message) and limited technical data (such as anonymised analytics and server logs) required to operate and secure the site.

sections.heading: 3. Purpose and legal basis
sections.body: We process your data to respond to enquiries (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR), to operate and improve the website (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR — legitimate interest), and where you have given consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR).

sections.heading: 4. Data retention
sections.body: We retain personal data only for as long as necessary for the purposes described above or as required by applicable law, after which it is securely deleted.

sections.heading: 5. Your rights
sections.body: Under the GDPR you have the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict and port your data, and to object to processing. You may also lodge a complaint with your supervisory authority.

sections.heading: 6. Contact
sections.body: To exercise any of these rights, please contact Leggera Labs using the contact details provided on this website.

impressum.title: Legal Notice
impressum.intro: Information pursuant to § 5 DDG (German Digital Services Act).
impressum.responsibleNote: Responsible for content pursuant to § 18 (2) MStV.
impressum.disclaimer: The contents of our pages were created with the greatest care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness or timeliness of the content. As a service provider we are responsible for our own content on these pages under general law.
